visual_description: A man in a brown suit and red tie rides a bicycle with a basket of produce on the front. He is pedaling on a paved road, smiling as he passes a group of professional cyclists in colorful jerseys who are riding in a tight pack. The cyclists are leaning forward in an aerodynamic posture, focused on the road ahead.
audio_description: A rock song with a male vocalist singing in a high-pitched voice plays in the background.
